title: The Daiphanium Arsenal
description: Unleash the power of one of the most powerful materials in the reality!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94275d4907ad635bee2c64250fb778f86b244205.png)

This mod adds in a new, extremely powerful material called "**Daiphanium**" (pronounced as "die-fain-ee-um") from my _Blackout Reality_. However, true to the original lore, this material is not mined from an ore, and instead is a synthetic material that must be created by combining many different materials. If it's needed, I can make and link a walkthrough video for the mod. Below is a list of the new blocks, items, weapons, tools, and armor you can acquire with the mod.


**NEW BLOCKS**
- Scoria
- Scoria Bricks
- Chiseled Scoria
- Indarium Ore
- Indarium Block
- Indarium Bricks
- Chiseled Indarium
- Indarium Lantern
- Daiphanium Block (with dyed variants)
- Daiphanium Bricks (with dyed variants)
- Daiphanium Tiles (with dyed variants)
- Daiphanium Pillar (with dyed variants)
- Daiphanium Lantern (with dyed variants)

**NEW ITEMS**
- Scoria Shard
- Indarium Crystal
- Unstable Daiphanium
- Daiphanium Ingot
- Daiphanium Rod
- Redstone Wire
- Redstone Circuit
- Gold Wire
- Cloaking Circuit
- Cloaking Core
- Lasercore (in 15 dye colors)
- Sponge

**NEW WEAPONS & TOOLS**
- Laserblade (in 15 dye colors)
- Lasersickle (in 15 dye colors)
- Laseraxe (in 15 dye colors)
- Laserspear (in 15 dye colors)
- Laserscythe (in 15 dye colors)
- Laserdagger (in 15 dye colors)

**NEW ARMOR**
- Indarium Armor
- Daiphanium Armor (in 15 dye colors)
- Cloaked Daiphanium Armor (invisible when worn by the player)
